calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-12-2026 Dismissal

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-05-2025 Set For Trial On Jan-12-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Motion To Dismiss For Lack Of Standing And Compel Private Arbitration
Off Calendar Mar-17-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Prior to Open court, Mr. Conley appears via Zoom. The clerk informs counsel no email to contest was received yesterday. Mr. Conley exits zoom.

Appearances:
Lakesha Barbarin 415-571-6252 Defendant in Pro Per. (In-person)
No other APpearance in Open Court.

RULING - The matter is Discussed. The Court explains the ruling of the court and reminds the party to follow the rules, guidelines and procedures. Ms. Barbarin responds. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT LAKESHA BARBARIN's Motion To Dismiss For Lack Of Standing And Compel Private Arbitration.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling..

Off calendar without prejudice to being re-filed. Per Code of Civil Procedure 1005(b), this motion, which may have been served by mail outside the State of California, was required to be served 16 court days plus 10 calendar days prior to the hearing, The certificate of service stating that service was by mail and/or electronic service is insufficient for the court to determine that any lesser time for service is permissible.

Visiting Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/HEK)
